rationale: In the citing paper, Chevalier and Mayzlin (2006) appears only once in a grouped literature citation listing prior studies on deterministic-quality products (books). The text does not discuss its specific findings, design, or mechanisms, and the paper's model development and hypotheses are built mainly from Sun (2012) and Zimmermann et al. (2018). This indicates a background positioning use rather than a distinct functional dependency on the cited study.
